case_title: OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL COPR.) VS. EUSTACIO DELIS GARCIA PEREZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-13-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-13-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY IRENE GUERRERO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT EUSTACIO DELIS GARCIA PEREZ. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-13-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL COPR.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PEREZ, EUSTACIO DELIS GARCIA $1,229.51 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,344.51 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
